log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:14+3=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Vampire — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:20+6=26 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 13 damage. Vampire — Winged Striker HP: 54/67
REASONING: Throwing rock at Vampire — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 30 damage. Vampire — Winged Striker HP: 24/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: No concentration active. 3 enemies. Recasting Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:18+3=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:10+-2=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!

→ Javelin: [d20:11+6=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Vampire — Winged Striker HP: 15/67
REASONING: Throwing rock at Vampire — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:13+9=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Vampire — Winged Striker HP: -10/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Vampire — Winged Striker.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Vampire — Winged Striker (distant).
